title: STRONGHEARTS NATIVE HELPLINE - 211info
text: STRONGHEARTS NATIVE HELPLINE STRONGHEARTS NATIVE HELPLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers confidential and anonymous domestic and sexual violence helpline. Provides culturally-appropriate, peer-to-peer support as well as crisis intervention, assistance with safety planning, education, and referrals to Native-centered domestic and sexual violence service providers. PO Box 22293 Eagan, MN 55122 Eligibility: American Indian and Alaska Natives affected by domestic, dating, and sexual violence. Also serves affected family members, friends, service providers, and people who may question their abusive behavior. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email - (844) 762-8483 247 1-844-7 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free Helpline (844) 762-8483 24/7 1-844-7NATIVE Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, or chat online FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Domestic Violence Hotlines * Native American Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
